title: Changing Board names
excerpt:
Description
Renaming Boards/cells - could be more efficient and less time consuming 
What are you trying to achieve
Renaming of boards at the boards name instead of having to go to the list on the left and choose rename …

posts.author: DavidS88 (David)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Renaming Boards/cells - could be more efficient and less time consuming

What are you trying to achieve

Renaming of boards at the boards name instead of having to go to the list on the left and choose rename would be more efficient also
When you enter a new cell to add the content, not having to delete the pre-populated contents e.g. “Item 1” would save a lot of time

posts.author: YOGESHP (Yogesh Pokale)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @DavidS88,
About renaming the board:
You can efficiently rename your boards directly from the board itself. Simply click on the board name in the top-left corner of the board to rename it. This lets you make changes without needing to navigate to the board list on the left.

image686×188 15.5 KB

posts.author: DavidS88 (David)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank You Yogesh - you’re a super I’ve been clicking in the wrong (clicking) place!!!
